quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.

asset_groups.name: Wave Graphic Device Colorway Family
asset_groups.semantics: Two approved wave colorways (Sunshine/Gold; Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants; select the colorway that pairs with the section's background/gradient.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width background of the Gradient Callout CTA section; do not re-host or recolor.

quotes: asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor

assets.description: Approved gold/orange gradient CTA button shape (rounded left, squared bottom-right notch) supplied as inline SVG with linear gradient stops for use as internal banner CTA treatment.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59"

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic device in Sunshine/Gold colorway (long and short variants); Gold top layer at 70% transparency over Sunshine base wave.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic device in Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway (long and short variants); Sky Blue top layer at 70% transparency over Deep Blue base wave.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Approved masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold) with the LISRAYA logo mark placed at the lightest end, used to hold copy in masthead positions.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: Core brand container device: a rectangle with two opposite corners selectively enlarged (asymmetric radii) and the other two corners kept at a slight radius; used to house callout text and photography crops.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.

assets.description: Pre-composited white icon badge (with shadow, accent radii, and icon baked in) as a transparent PNG, for pixel-perfect Outlook rendering of the icon callout badge overhang.

quotes: the brand-safe option is to **pre-composite the white badge (with its shadow, accent radii, and icon) as a transparent PNG** and place it via the same absolute positioning

assets.description: Brand icon set in minimal line illustration style with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work; new icons must match this stylistic approach.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

assets.description: LISRAYA logo icon mark; its Gold (#ffc60a) fill must be maintained at 70% transparency in all instances, whether used as the logo itself or as a repeating pattern/graphic.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

subtypes.best_for: Brand masthead elements that must never be reproduced within assembled sections.

quotes: all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team

subtypes.name: Locked Header Component

subtypes.best_for: Priovant logo, copyright line, registered trademark legal line, job code, indication, and ISI content — supplied and locked by the core team.

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below

subtypes.name: Locked Footer/ISI Component

templates.description: Approved plug-and-play MJML CTA banner: full-width gradient background image with fallback solid color, centered headline in the top third, and a centered pill-radius button with gold arrow in the lower-middle.

quotes: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

templates.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
templates.notes: Signature asymmetric button radius (49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) mandatory on every instance, even when background is skipped.

templates.description: Approved plug-and-play MJML block for the light-blue accent-shape callout box with a white icon badge straddling the box's left edge, used for supporting proof-point statements.

quotes: ### [IMPORTANT] Icon Callout Box Rule
A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge**

templates.name: Icon Callout Box
templates.notes: Outlook does not honor position:absolute; brand-safe fallback is a pre-composited transparent PNG badge (see ast_lisraya_icon_badge_precomposited_png).
